title: Gluten-Free Bao Cream Biscuit Sandwich
description: A unique dessert combining the textures of gluten-free biscuits and bao with the creaminess of sweet cream. Perfect for those with gluten intolerance.
instructions: 2. Crush the gluten-free biscuits and set aside.
3. Split the bao into halves and toast until lightly browned.
4. In a separate bowl, whip the sweet cream until stiff peaks form.
5. In another bowl, mix together the crushed Malaysian sweet biscuits and Oreo biscuits.
6. If desired, add sugar, milk, and vanilla extract to the whipped cream and mix well.
7. To assemble the sandwich, place a toasted bao half on a serving plate, followed by a dollop of whipped cream, a sprinkle of crushed biscuit mixture, and finally another toasted bao half.
8. Repeat the layers to create a triple-layered sandwich.
